title: Operator loop plan surfaces domain pack load health
problem: Tickets 123–125 documented NM-5 runtime loading across README, AGENTS.md, and 06_DOMAIN_PACK_SPEC.md, but operator_loop plan mode does not report whether the creativity pack loads cleanly or which overlays are present.
acceptance_criteria: operator_loop --mode plan includes domain_pack_status for creativity pack.
Status reports pack id, active identity, and loaded overlay file names.
Plan mode remains read-only; no queue or DB writes.
Golden tests and full pytest remain green.
non_goals: No domain pack loader changes beyond read-only introspection.
No public site or schema changes.
